name: com.tecvoodoo.mcp-tools
description: Custom MCP tool extensions for Claude AI Game Developer. 46 tool groups covering Flexalon, PWB, RayFire, MagicaCloth2, FinalIK, AssetInventory, MalbersAC, QuestForge, RetargetPro, RopeToolkit, HeathenPhysics, HeathenBallistics, Feel, DamageNumbersPro, Cinemachine, AnimationRigging, ALINE, MasterAudio, A*Pathfinding, DialogueSystem, SensorToolkit, UCC, BehaviorDesigner, DOTween, UnityEntities, UnityPhysics, BroAudio, Koreographer, PMG, Maestro, DryWetMIDI, FMOD, Chunity, Naninovel, AdventureCreator, TextAnimator, InkIntegration, 2.5DTerrain, 2.5DBridgeBuilder, DecalCollider, TextureStudio, AINavigation, Animancer, JuicyActions, BoingKit, and MudBun. Tools auto-activate via MCPToolsDefineManager when target assets are detected.
